query:
CREATE TABLE `seo_keywords` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`storeId` int NOT NULL,
	`keyword` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`volume` int,
	`difficulty` int,
	`relevanceScore` int,
	`status` enum('suggested','active','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'suggested',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `seo_keywords_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3eWPFCBhXN3VhAz.root --database R65at2L4nXpfNokxNrB7Yp --execute CREATE TABLE `seo_keywords` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`storeId` int NOT NULL,
	`keyword` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`volume` int,
	`difficulty` int,
	`relevanceScore` int,
	`status` enum('suggested','active','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'suggested',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `seo_keywords_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
